tagline: Professional Pool and Spa Service You Can Trust

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves an Owner Who
Shows Up
hero.subheadline: Josh Johnson and his 18-person crew have spent 17 years keeping Chandler pools crystal clear. From weekly maintenance to full remodels, you get transparent pricing, honest advice, and a contractor who answers his own phone.
checkmarks: Parts billed at cost, zero markup

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Care<br class="hidden md:block">From One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: Whether your pool needs a weekly tune-up or a complete transformation, Clarity Pool Service has the crew, equipment, and 17 years of East Valley experience to handle it right the first time.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Thorough weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks keep your pool swim-ready all year in the Arizona heat. No contracts required.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Repair
cards.description: Pumps, motors, filters, plumbing, leaks — our 18-person crew diagnoses fast and fixes right. Parts billed at cost with zero markup.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: New tile, pebble finishes, complete surface renovation. Josh personally oversees every remodel from planning to final walkthrough.

cards.title: Salt System & Automation
cards.description: Saltwater chlorination and smart automation systems let you control your pool from your phone. Gentler water, easier management.

cards.title: Tile Cleaning & Acid Wash
cards.description: Remove calcium buildup, stains, and algae with professional tile cleaning, drain services, and acid wash treatments.

cards.title: Leak Detection & PVC Repair
cards.description: Pinpoint leaks fast with professional detection equipment, then repair PVC plumbing to stop water loss and prevent further damage.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Pool You Can Trust

steps.title: Call Josh Directly
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. Josh personally reviews every request and provides an honest, no-pressure assessment within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Show Up and Deliver
steps.description: Our licensed, experienced crew arrives on schedule with the right equipment. Every service is thorough, every invoice is transparent — parts at cost, labor clearly itemized.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal Clear Water
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling, your equipment runs right, and you have a contractor who picks up the phone when you call. That’s the Clarity difference.

about.label: Why Chandler Trusts Clarity
about.headline: Owner-Operated Means the Buck Stops with Josh
about.description: Since 2009, Josh Johnson has built Clarity Pool Service on a simple principle: treat every pool like it’s your own. With a team of 18 professionals, two ROC contractor licenses, and a commitment to billing parts at cost, Clarity has become one of the most trusted names in the East Valley. We don’t do contracts because we’d rather earn your business every single visit.

features.title: Transparent, Fair Pricing
features.description: We show you the invoice for every part — billed at our cost, not retail. No hidden fees, no surprise markups, ever.

features.title: 18-Person Professional Crew
features.description: Specialized equipment, technical expertise, and the manpower to handle anything from a filter clean to a full remodel.

features.title: BBB Accredited & Fully Bonded
features.description: Two ROC licenses, BBB accreditation, full bonding and insurance. Your investment is protected by a contractor who plays by the book.

pricing.headline: Fair Prices. Honest Invoices. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every job quoted upfront with parts at cost. No contracts, no cancellation fees — just reliable pool care you can count on.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any service visit doesn’t meet your expectations, call Josh directly and we’ll come back to make it right at no extra charge. We’ve built our reputation on honesty and follow-through for 17 years, and we’re not about to stop now. Your satisfaction isn’t a policy — it’s a promise from the owner himself.

faqs.question: How quickly can Clarity start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For urgent repairs or green pool situations, call Josh directly at (602) 903-7280 and we'll get a crew out as fast as possible.

faqs.question: Do you really bill parts at cost with no markup?
faqs.answer: Yes. We show you the actual supplier invoice for every part we install. Our profit comes from fair labor rates, not inflated parts prices. One customer reported saving $250 on a single repair because of this policy.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Clarity Pool Service holds two ROC contractor licenses (#322348 and #322349), is fully bonded and insured, and is a BBB Accredited Business. You can verify our credentials anytime.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a contract for weekly service?
faqs.answer: Never. We don't do contracts because we believe in earning your business every visit. You can adjust, pause, or cancel your service anytime with zero fees or penalties.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire East Valley and greater Phoenix metro including Chandler, Gilbert, Mesa, Tempe, Queen Creek, San Tan Valley, Ahwatukee, and surrounding Maricopa County communities.

testimonials.name: Yelp Reviewer
testimonials.text: Josh gets an A+ for his hands on approach, communication, listening, planning and creating this beautiful oasis. Highly recommend Clarity Pool Service for any pool remodeling project.

testimonials.name: Yellow Pages Reviewer
testimonials.text: The owner explained they did not retail parts, showing invoices for repairs at cost, saving me $250. They also provided free service to fix a small leak that had been bothering me for over a year. Truly honest and fair.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: Josh is amazing, reliable and honest. I cannot recommend their service enough. Awesome, cheap, and prompt — definitely the best in Chandler.

contact.headline:

contact.subtitle: Call Josh directly or request a free assessment online. No contracts, no pressure — just honest pricing from a contractor who’s been doing this for 17 years.
